basics.name: Thanh Trung Nguyen
basics.headline: QA Automation Engineer — Playwright/TypeScript, full-stack test automation
basics.pitch: Full-stack test automation — UI, APIs, and data — built with Playwright and TypeScript.
basics.metaDescription: Playwright/TypeScript QA engineer — full-stack test automation across UI, APIs, and databases.
basics.status: Independent contractor (IČO) — open to contract or permanent
basics.summary: QA / test automation engineer with ~9 years across e-commerce, corporate travel, and regulated gaming. I build full-stack test automation with Playwright and TypeScript — covering UI, REST APIs, and databases — and bring performance and messaging-based testing (k6, Kafka, Azure Service Bus) to systems that need it. I build the QA tooling and dashboards a team needs.

work.domain: Czech online-grocery e-commerce — testing the CRM area across a hybrid microservices + monolith architecture.
highlights: Test the CRM area of the platform end to end — UI flows, REST APIs (Postman, k6), and databases (MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL).
Author and maintain Playwright (TypeScript) and k6 suites, validate asynchronous flows over Azure Service Bus, and build test-data migrations for test environments.

work.domain: Corporate-travel compliance application (admin + client web apps).
highlights: Tested admin and client web apps end to end via REST (Postman), MySQL / PostgreSQL (DBeaver), Docker / Kubernetes (Lens), and Sentry.
Built automation in WebdriverIO (TypeScript) and load tests in k6.
Owned a local test environment and test server, managed the mobile test-device fleet, and acted as Jira admin for QA across projects.

work.domain: Back-office accounting / data-aggregation tool for the online-gaming industry.
highlights: Tested how data flows through the system and database, plus background jobs and other backend processes.
Ran functional, integration, regression, and production sanity testing; wrote functional and UAT scenarios.

work.domain: Regulated gaming — terminals and web integrations.
highlights: Prepared and tested products for GLI certification, Romanian gaming legislation, and the B3 certificate.
Ran UAT, manual, and mobile-device testing; managed the test-device fleet.

earlier.note: Automotive filtration lab — ran tests and collected data during studies.

projects.name: Watch Later Tamer
projects.tagline: Pull, categorize, and cull YouTube Watch Later playlist — watch inline, delete on the spot.
projects.description: A single-file local tool that pulls my un-API-able Watch Later, LLM-categorizes every video, and lets me filter by topic / year / length, watch in an embedded player, and remove on the spot (with undo). Built with Claude Code.

education.institution: ČVUT v Praze — Faculty of Mechanical Engineering
education.note: Did not complete — left to work.
